summary: Twelve military trucks were assessed: one confirmed undamaged, eleven probable damaged with visible scorch marks, broken windshields, and debris. The full scene shows a long line of military trucks parked along a road littered with debris and scorch marks, indicating recent combat or damage. The likely functional impact is severely degraded mobility and operational capability for the convoy due to visible damage and debris obstructing the road.
